---
name: Setup Error
about: Something went wrong during setup? Tell us so we can fix it.
title: "Setup error: [which step]"
labels: setup-error
---

**No worries — this stuff happens. Help us fix it for the next person.**

### Which step broke?
<!-- e.g., "Install Bun", "Install Claude Code", "GitHub login" -->


### What happened?
<!-- What did you see on screen? Copy/paste any error messages if you can. -->


### What did you expect to happen?
<!-- e.g., "It should have installed successfully" -->


### Your setup
- **Mac model:** <!-- e.g., Mac Mini M2, MacBook Air M1 -->
- **macOS version:** <!-- e.g., 15.2 — find it in Apple menu > About This Mac -->
- **How far did you get?** <!-- e.g., "Steps 1-3 worked, step 4 failed" -->

### Error log (if you have it)
<!--
The setup script saves errors to ~/.claude/setup-errors.log
If that file exists, paste its contents here:
-->

```
(paste log contents here)
```

### Anything else?
<!-- Optional — any other context that might help -->
